title: Customize
description: The mod replaces the standard skin system, adding the ability to change your character for the rest of the game upon entering the world.
body:
Currently, the mod allows you to customize your character's skin tone, eye color, hair color, and hairstyle the first time you log in.
It supports resource packs and should work with many mods.
You have clothes!

**This mod was created with the support of Minecraft hosting minely.net**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4fVzOAuiaLQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
